original_image_tags: A faded "T. S. Cont. No." stamp is visible in the upper right, partially illegible, appearing to read "9-8442" or similar. Below it, "APOL, HQ USAF" is stamped.

elements.description: A single page of a typed government form, specifically an 'Air Intelligence Information Report' (AF Form 112, dated 15 Sep 54). The form contains typed text fields, a summary narrative describing an eyewitness account of a 'genuine flying saucer or flying disc' sighting in the USSR on 4 Oct 55, a signature for 'Thomas S. Ryan, Lt. Col., Air Attache', distribution information, and a classification stamp at the bottom indicating 'SECRET' was canceled or changed to 'SECRET' on 30 April 1959.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no real visual content (photographs, sketches, etc.), as Description A mentions only stamps and Description B explicitly states [typed_text_only].
